backstory.original: Raised as a gladiator in the pit arenas of Kara-Tur, Korth has since traveled the world studying fighting styles and the art of war. Korth is infamous for his skill and efficiency in battle - and for his ruthlessness, as he never spares the lives of his opponents. Those who cross Korth's path do so at their own risk.
backstory.display: 科思在卡拉图的竞技场被培养成为一名角斗士，此后他周游世界，研究战斗的方式和战争艺术。科思因其在战斗中的技巧和效率而臭名昭著，冷酷无情的他从不饶恕对手性命，那些与科思擦肩而过的人都要风险自负。

description.original: Korth charges out and attacks the nearest non-marked enemy with his samurai sword.
description.display: 科思冲上前去，用他的武士刀攻击距离最近未被标记的敌人。

description.original: Korth leaps to the nearest enemy and ferociously bites them.
description.display: 科思跳向距离最近的敌人并疯狂撕咬。

longDescription.original: Korth leaps to the nearest enemy and ferociously bites them, causing massive damage and a bleed for 5x the base damage over 5 seconds.
longDescription.display: 科思跳向距离最近的敌人并疯狂撕咬，造成高额伤害和持续 5 秒的 5 倍基础伤害流血效果。

description.desc: Korth increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 16+ by $(amount)% and reduces their normal attack cooldown by $(amount___2) seconds.
科思使所有敏捷达到 16+ 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)% 并使其普通攻击冷却时间缩短 $(amount___2) 秒。

tipText.original: Korth increases the damage of Champions with a high Dexterity score (16+)
tipText.display: 科思使高敏捷（16+）勇士的伤害提高。

description.desc: Enemies Korth attacks become Marked until they are defeated. Marked enemies take $(amount)% more damage from all attacks.
科思攻击的敌人会被标记直到被击败为止。被标记的敌人受到的所有攻击伤害增加 $(amount)%。

Whenever a Champion attacks any enemy that is Marked, they gain $(amount) temporary hit points. This effect is increased by $(tank_bonus_percent)% on Champions with the Tanking role. This effect can only occur for each Champion once every $(cooldown_seconds) seconds.
当一名勇士攻击任意被标记的敌人时，获得 $(amount) 点临时生命值。对于坦克角色的勇士，该效果提升至 $(tank_bonus_percent)%。每位勇士的此效果在 $(cooldown_seconds) 秒内仅能发动一次。
Korth sums up the total Dexterity scores of all Champions in the formation and increases the effect of Rapid Training by $(not_buffed amount)% for each point, stacking multiplicatively.
科思将阵型中所有勇士的敏捷总数值归纳起来，每一点敏捷使快速训练的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Korth likes formations with lots of high Dexterity Champions. The more dexterity, the better he buffs!
tipText.display: 科思喜欢拥有大量高敏捷勇士的阵型。敏捷越高，他的增益效果越好！

description.desc: Korth increases the base Dexterity scores of the Champions in the two slots directly behind him to $(amount), if they weren't already $(amount) or higher.
科思将位于他正后方两个格子内的勇士的基础敏捷提高至 $(amount)，除非其敏捷已经达到或高于 $(amount)。

specializationDescription.original: Korth trains the two Champions directly behind him in the ways of the samurai, potentially increasing their Dexterity scores.
specializationDescription.display: 科思以武士的方式训练他正后方的两位勇士，可能会提高其敏捷。

description.desc: Korth increases the base Dexterity scores of the Champions in the two slots directly in front of him to $(amount), if they weren't already $(amount) or higher.
科思将位于他正前方两个格子内的勇士的基础敏捷提高至 $(amount)，除非其敏捷已经达到或高于 $(amount)。

specializationDescription.original: Korth trains the two Champions directly in front of him in the ways of the samurai, potentially increasing their Dexterity scores.
specializationDescription.display: 科思以武士的方式训练他前方的两位勇士，可能会提高其敏捷。

description.desc: Korth increases the base Dexterity scores of the Champions in the two slots directly above and below him to $(amount), if they weren't already $(amount) or higher.
科思将位于他正上方和下方两个格子内的勇士的基础敏捷提高至 $(amount)，除非其敏捷已经达到或高于 $(amount)。

specializationDescription.original: Korth trains the two Champions directly above and below him in the ways of the samurai, potentially increasing their Dexterity scores.
specializationDescription.display: 科思以武士的方式训练他上下方的两位勇士，可能会提高其敏捷。

description.desc: Whenever any Champion is about to be killed and this ability is available, Korth prevents the death. The Champion stays at 1HP, gains the Fighting Spirit shield, and is invulnerable for $(invulnerable_time) seconds. Then, Korth immediately makes an ultimate attack against the enemy that tried to kill the Champion. This ability has up to $(max_charges) charges and regenerates 1 charge every 1 minute.
每当有任意勇士即将被击杀且该技能可用时，科思会避免其死亡。该勇士会保持 1 点生命值，获得斗志护盾，并在 $(invulnerable_time) 秒内免疫伤害。之后，科思会立即向试图击杀该勇士的敌人发动一次杀招攻击。该技能最多有 $(max_charges) 层充能，每 1 分钟恢复 1 层充能。

Korth tracks the highest number of enemies that he has simultaneously Marked in the current area, and he increases the damage bonus of Rapid Training by $(not_buffed amount)% for each of those enemies, stacking multiplicatively.
科思追踪他在当前区域同时标记的敌人中数值最高者，每个被标记的敌人会使他快速训练的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.original: What's good for the tribe is good for all.
description.display: 对部落有利的事，对所有人都有利。

description.original: If we are steady and forceful, we will prevail.
description.display: 如果我们稳定而有力量，我们就会取得胜利。

description.original: My heart beats with the blood of a warrior; a legend.
description.display: 我的心脏脉动着战士和传奇的鲜血。

description.original: I can protect you from small injuries.
description.display: 我可以保护你不受小伤。
你们这些没有鳞片的家伙，太散漫了。

description.original: I have worked out all the contingencies.
description.display: 我已经想好了所有的应急措施。

description.original: All at once! Bring them down!

effects.description: Increases the damage effect of Korth's Rapid Training ability by $(amount)%

description.original: You're scale-less, but I guess we can work together
description.display: 你没有鳞片，但我们应该可以合作。

description.original: They will have nowhere to run.

effects.description: Increases the damage effect of Korth's Rapid Training ability by $(amount)%
Increases the attack cooldown reduction effect of Korth's Rapid Training ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Not everything can be learned in cities.
My people know this method well.
description.display: 我的人很了解这种方法。

description.original: The battle will end before you even see me draw my blade.
description.display: 战斗会在你看到我拔剑之前结束。

description.original: Let them know we have arrived.
description.display: 让他们知道，我们已经来到了。

description.original: If they can't see your blade, they can't block it!
description.display: 如果他们看不见你的利刃，那他们就没法招架！

description.original: You want me to pretend to have emotions?
description.display: 你想让我假装拥有情感？
智慧来源于没有感情的思考。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Raised as a gladiator in the pit arenas of Kara-Tur, Korth has since traveled the world studying fighting styles and the art of war. Korth is infamous for his skill and efficiency in battle - and for his ruthlessness, as he never spares the lives of his opponents. Those who cross Korth's path do so at their own risk.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Korth marks enemies as he attacks, allowing other Champions who attack them to attack faster and do more damage.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 科思在卡拉图的竞技场被培养成为一名角斗士，此后他周游世界，研究战斗的方式和战争艺术。科思因其在战斗中的技巧和效率而臭名昭著，冷酷无情的他从不饶恕对手性命，那些与科思擦肩而过的人都要风险自负。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 科思会标记他攻击的敌人，使进攻这些敌人的勇士能够提升攻击速度和伤害。

display.name: 武士训练（前）
display.specialization_description: 科思以武士的方式训练他前方的两位勇士，可能会提高其敏捷。

original.specialization_description: Korth trains the two Champions directly above and below him in the ways of the samurai, potentially increasing their Dexterity scores.

display.specialization_description: 科思以武士的方式训练他上下方的两位勇士，可能会提高其敏捷。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: What's good for the tribe is good for all.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 对部落有利的事，对所有人都有利。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: If we are steady and forceful, we will prevail.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 如果我们稳定而有力量，我们就会取得胜利。

display.name: 战斗治疗师

display.name: 毫无情感
display.description: 你们这些没有鳞片的家伙，太散漫了。

display.name: 逻辑思想家

display.name: 洞察
display.description: 智慧来源于没有感情的思考。

original.name: Actor

display.description: 你想让我假装拥有情感？

original.name: Iaido

display.name: 居合道

提升科思的“快速训练”技能伤害效果 $(amount)%

display.name: 投掷武器

original.name: Scale of Friends
original.description: You're scale-less, but I guess we can work together

display.name: 鳞片之交
display.description: 你没有鳞片，但我们应该可以合作。
